title: Limbs
description: Allowing you to wear mob limbs to replace yours
body:
Ever saw some of your enemies and thought "I can rock those limbs way better than they do", no?
Well, Limbs allows you to collect the limbs of your enemies and then wear them whether you like it or not.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
